ATLAS.$ZBAP.DEBINV.obey_form:
ASSUME JOB

RESET
SET VOLUME \ATLAS.$SYSTEM.SYSTEM, "NCNU"
SET IN \ATLAS.$SYSEXP.OPRBAT.STOPUPDT
SET OUT \ATLAS.$VHPAK
SET EXECUTOR-PROGRAM \ATLAS.$SYSTEM.SYSTEM.TACL
SET JOB-LOG \ATLAS.$VHPAK
SET TERM \ATLAS.$VHPAK
SET PFS 0
SET PRI 100
SET SELPRI 3
SET MAXPRINTLINES NONE
SET MAXPRINTPAGES NONE
SET JOB CLASS SUPER
SET HOLD ON
SET RESTART ON
SET STALL OFF
SET STOP-ON-ABEND OFF
SET HOLDAFTER ON
SET EVERY 50 4 14 10 *
SET AT 14OCT47 04:50:00
SET IFFAILS ON
SET HIGHPIN ON
==CHANGEUSER 255,255
SET DESCRIPTION "INVENTAIRE Stop updaters RDF timestamp"
SUBMIT DEBINV
